title: Welcome to the refreshed cropwatch.io
description: The US/Global CropWatch site has been updated with the latest hardware story, US units, an interactive parts-origin chart and authoritative citations for every technical claim.

content.text: We have rolled out a major refresh of cropwatch.io. The site now reflects the newest hardware details and displays every measurement in US units - Fahrenheit first, with Celsius alongside.

items: Updated sensor specifications across all product pages
An interactive parts-origin chart - hover a country to see its manufacturers
Every technical term now links to its official source (Sensirion, NIST, LoRa Alliance, ISO, FDA and more)
A faster, lighter site with no horizontal scrolling on phones

content.text: Questions, or want to see CropWatch on your own coolers, barns or greenhouses? We would love to show you.
